opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My doctor's clinic sent an automated text saying my liver blood test was abnormal, and now my right side is aching and I feel a bit sick. Should I be going to hospital?
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The message freaked me out and then I noticed the ache. I want to know if this is an emergency tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 hours ago, after I got the text
symptom_narrative.character: a vague dull ache, comes and goes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there since I started worrying about it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: pressing on it and thinking about it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: slight nausea, no vomiting, no fever, no yellow eyes

family_history_as_reported.narrative: an aunt has an autoimmune thyroid condition

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: rarely, a glass of wine occasionally
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very health-anxious, has been reading about liver failure online

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to be told she does not have liver failure

communication_style.typical_message_style: detailed, cites things she has read online
